Why Choose Sottovento Luxury Ride

Professional Chauffeurs

Licensed, experienced and discreet drivers.

Flight Tracking

We monitor your flight and adjust pickup time automatically.

Meet & Greet Service

Your driver will wait with a personalized sign at arrivals.

Luxury SUV Fleet

Escalade and Suburban vehicles for premium comfort.

Your Trusted Luxury Transportation
in Orlando

Sottovento Luxury Ride is a premium transportation service based in Orlando, Florida. We specialize in private chauffeur service, airport transfers, corporate travel, and luxury rides for families, executives, and visitors.

01

Professional Team

Our team is formed by professional drivers, each fully insured with their own commercial company. We take pride in offering punctuality, safety, and a VIP approach in every service.

02

VIP Experience

Whether you are visiting Orlando for business or vacation, we ensure a smooth, comfortable, and reliable travel experience with attention to every detail.

At Sottovento Luxury Ride, we provide a personalized and professional transportation experience across Orlando. Our service combines comfort, safety, and punctuality to ensure every ride feels first-class.

Our Services

Comprehensive luxury transportation solutions tailored to your needs

Airport Transfers (MCO & Sanford)

Professional pick-ups with flight tracking, meet & greet options, and luggage assistance.

MCO to Port Canaveral Transfers

Seamless luxury rides from Orlando Airport to Port Canaveral cruise terminals.

Private Chauffeur – Hourly

Ideal for executives, concerts, shopping, special dinners, or spending the day with full flexibility.

Corporate Transportation

Discreet and reliable service for meetings, conventions and business trips.

Theme Park Transfers

Disney, Universal, SeaWorld, resorts and attractions across Orlando.

Events & Special Occasions

Weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, sports events and private celebrations.

Family & Group Rides

Comfortable transportation for families, large groups and multi-stop itineraries.

Our Luxury Fleet

Immaculate vehicles equipped with premium amenities for your comfort

Cadillac Escalade

Up to 6 passengers
  • •Seats up to 6 passengers
  • •Premium leather interior
  • •Ideal for VIP and airport transfers

Chevrolet Suburban

Up to 6 passengers
  • •Large luggage capacity
  • •Premium leather interior
  • •Perfect for families and cruise port rides

Mercedes-Benz S-Class

Up to 3 passengers
  • •Luxury comfort
  • •Premium leather interior
  • •Corporate transportation
